heading: Computation of retired pay: law applicable
label: 9329 Computation of retired pay: law applicable
text: A member of the Air Force or the Space Force retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 945 of this title.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8929[No source].[No source].The revised section is based on the various retirement provisions in this chapter and is inserted to make explicit the entitlement to retired pay upon retirement.
